_comment: MCP server entry for UML diagram generation via antoinebou12/uml-mcp.
Merge the 'uml' key below into the mcpServers object of the project-root .mcp.json.
Requires 'uvx' (from Astral uv) on PATH. PLANTUML_SERVER overrides the rendering endpoint.
Remove the _comment key before using this file.

uml._when_to_use: Gives Claude the ability to generate UML diagrams (class, sequence, component, activity, state, use-case, ER) from natural-language or structural input. Used by documentation-writer, software-architect, technical-analyst, api-designer, doc-expert, backend-documentation and frontend-documentation capabilities to emit diagrams into docs/diagrams/ during documentation, architecture design, system modeling and code-structure explanation tasks.
